title: Discover the Enchanting Beauty of Croatia

scenes.text: Plitvice Lakes showcase cascading waterfalls and vibrant blue waters.
Located in central Croatia, Plitvice Lakes is a national park.
It's home to 16 terraced lakes connected by waterfalls.
The park is renowned for its vibrant hues of blue and green.
scenes.label: VIBRANT COLORS

scenes.text: Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Plitvice Lakes, Lika-Senj - Croatia. A breathtaking national park with stunning waterfalls and colorful lakes. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
